incident: Assumed domain-based provisioning; multi-domain tenants could not onboard correctly.
impact: Reworked auth middleware and moved to SCIM-based provisioning; 1.5 weeks slip.
better_breakpoint: Architecture sign-off: verify identity flows for multi-domain tenants and SCIM scope before branching into tasks.

incident: Webhook retries processed out of order; no idempotency keys used.
impact: Duplicate invoices and support escalations; emergency hotfix and invoice cleanup.
better_breakpoint: Before go-live: simulate webhook retry storms and confirm idempotency keys end-to-end.

incident: Ambiguous 'Admin contact' field led to elevated privileges for non-admin users.
impact: Support tickets and manual role corrections for 40 accounts.
late_catch: Week 1 of pilot after several invites mis-assigned.
better_breakpoint: Before UI commit: 5-minute role-clarity check on field labels and validation rules.

incident: Free-text 'company_size' migrated without normalization, breaking segmentation rules.
impact: Two weeks of rework normalizing values and adjusting downstream rules.
better_breakpoint: Pre-migration dry run: validate data shape against business rules and normalization rules.

incident: Color contrast failures discovered after component library freeze.
impact: Late-stage CSS refactor and missed SLA by 3 days.
late_catch: Final design QA right before code freeze.
better_breakpoint: Before component library freeze: run automated a11y checks on shared components and fix violations.
